Applicable SOPs: Change Ship Method on PO - Not Shipped SOP (DSC2S) - VCN
Text: Hello Wayfair Team, Thank you for reaching out regarding this PO however, in order to approve ship method changes the following must be included: LTL to small parcel: Have you confirmed the girth (using the formula above): Y/N Did the supplier confirm they can accommodate the change: Y/N Name of contact at the supplier who confirmed this for you: _______ Small parcel to LTL: The reason we are changing this to LTL: ______ Have you confirmed the pickup hours? Did the supplier confirm they can accommodate the change: Y/N Name of contact at the supplier who confirmed this for you: _______ If the consultant is unable to reach the supplier by phone, they will need to enter a product questions ticket in order to receive this confirmation. Thank you,

Applicable SOPs: Change Ship Method on PO - Not Shipped SOP (DSC2S) - VCN
Text: Hello Wayfair Team, Thank you for reaching out on this. Please note that this request type is limited to providing support on if a PO needs the ship-via method changed temporarily for fulfillment purposes. This ticket will be closed as the request is out of scope. This request type is not supplier facing, so please note supplier partners are unable to view or respond to this request. If supplier visibility is required on this request, please submit a new request on the suppliers behalf in Partner Home utilizing the following request path: Help & Support > Submit a Ticket > Dropship Order Fulfillment > Problem Fulfilling an Order > General Fulfillment Help Thank you,
